name: Date and Nut Bars
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 325 degrees Fahrenheit.
2. In a bowl, beat the eggs until light.
3. Add sugar and shortening; blend well.
4. Sift flour and baking powder together and blend into the mixture.
5. Stir in dates, nuts, and vanilla.
6. Pour the batter into a greased 8 x 8-inch pan.
7. Bake for 25 minutes.
8. Cool on a wire rack.
9. Cut into small squares or oblongs.
10. Roll in confectioners sugar.
11. Store in a covered container.
Yield: 18-24 bars
